{{CargoRelic
|name=The Thread of Fate
|class_id=20235
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The thread was compiled by the Fates. The three goddesses each played their role. Clotho held a distaff, Lachesis spun, and Atropos, the eldest of the three, cut the thread. It's the circle of life!
|fame=15
|art=13
|fth=29
|civ=16
|tech=17
|ss1=Per 6 Moody Costume Stars, Snail ATK +1<br>Moody Stars: 192/192
|ss2=Per 6 Moody Costume Stars, Snail ATK +2<br>Moody Stars: 192/192
|ss3=Per 6 Moody Costume Stars, Snail ATK +3<br>Moody Stars: 192/192
|ss4=Per 6 Moody Costume Stars, Snail ATK +3<br>Moody Stars: 192/192
|ss7=Per 6 Moody Costume Stars, Snail ATK +3<br>Moody Stars: 192/192<br> (Awakened)
}}
